name: Bar-Cohen Natural Convection Benchmark
description: Vertical aluminum plate-fin heatsink per Bar-Cohen & Rohsenow (1984). Large heatsink with black anodized finish — radiation should contribute meaningfully.

provenance.citation: Bar-Cohen, A., and Rohsenow, W. M. (1984). Thermally Optimum Spacing of Vertical, Natural Convection Cooled, Parallel Plates. Journal of Heat Transfer, 106(1), 116-123.
provenance.notes: Representative natural-convection validation case. Exact output values are not tabulated in the paper, so the expected outputs are broad literature-range checks rather than a digitized table match.

notes: Uses explicit material properties (not a preset) since this is a literature benchmark. No TIM or junction resistance — isolated sink performance only.
